name: mcp-email
description: A Model Context Protocol (MCP) server for handling SMTP/IMAP email operations. This server allows you to search past emails, send new emails, and manage multiple email accounts.
author: brandontillman.com

scripts.build: go mod download && go build -ldflags "-X main.version=$(git describe --tags --always --dirty 2>/dev/null || echo dev)" -o bin/mcp-email-server ./cmd/server
